events.title: Workshops
events.subtitle: Intro to Figma
events.descriptionPresent: Learn how to use Figma to design wireframes and prototypes from scratch. By the end, you'll have hands-on experience and a basic project to show off!
events.descriptionPast: Students learned how to use Figma to design wireframes and prototypes from scratch. By the end, everyone had hands-on experience and a basic project to show off!

events.title: Workshops
events.subtitle: What is Research?
events.descriptionPresent: This session introduces key research methods, strategies for exploring topics, and techniques for asking stronger questions to guide your research. Led by Sina, the workshop includes an interactive Kahoot quiz with opportunities to win small prizes. It’s a casual session with plenty of opportunities to ask questions.
events.descriptionPast: This session introduced key research methods, strategies for exploring topics, and techniques for asking stronger questions to guide research. Led by Sina, the workshop featured an interactive Kahoot quiz with opportunities to win small prizes. It was a casual session with many opportunities to ask questions.

events.title: Workshops
events.subtitle: From Data to Insight
events.descriptionPresent: Explore how to identify patterns when analyzing data and transform findings into meaningful insights. This interactive session, led by Sina, will include activities like Kahoot, prizes, and guided slides.
events.descriptionPast: Participants explored how to identify patterns when analyzing data and transform findings into meaningful insights. This interactive session, led by Sina, included activities like Kahoot, prizes, and guided slides.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Coffee Chat + Fireside Panel
events.descriptionPresent: Join Sarah Nabil and guest speakers from both academia and industry for a relaxed, podcast-style panel discussion. The conversation will be open, thoughtful, and easy to follow, with opportunities for you to submit questions via Slido—anonymously if preferred. Slides will provide speaker introductions, the Slido QR code, and wrap-up notes.
events.descriptionPast: Attendees joined Sarah Nabil and guest speakers from both academia and industry for a relaxed, podcast-style panel discussion. The conversation was open, thoughtful, and easy to follow, with opportunities to submit questions via Slido—anonymously if preferred. Slides provided speaker introductions, the Slido QR code, and wrap-up notes.

events.title: Workshops
events.subtitle: Let’s Talk Interviews (Part 1)
events.descriptionPresent: Learn how to conduct effective interviews. We’ll discuss different interview types, how to prepare, and best practices for engaging with participants. You’ll also have the opportunity to run a short, informal interview on a topic of your choice.
events.descriptionPast: This session focused on how to conduct effective interviews. We discussed different interview types, how to prepare, and best practices for engaging with participants. Attendees also had the opportunity to run a short, informal interview on a topic of their choice.

events.title: Workshops
events.subtitle: Figma Prototypes
events.descriptionPresent: For those already familiar with the basics, this session focuses on creating interactive prototypes and using advanced Figma features. We’ll also cover best practices for collaboration and effectively sharing your work.
events.descriptionPast: For those already familiar with the basics, this session focused on creating interactive prototypes and using advanced Figma features. We also covered best practices for collaboration and effectively sharing work.
